text.title: AI User Story Decomposition Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Story reads 'AI handles customer questions'. Eng builds chatbot. PM rejects: 'I meant a recommender'.
antipattern.fix: Per-AC line names: AI scope + deterministic fallback + handoff signal.

antipattern.symptom: Story ships. 3 weeks later 'is it working?' — no one knows.
antipattern.fix: Mandate ≥1 numeric eval AC per AI behavior (precision/recall/cost/latency); story-review rejects without.

antipattern.symptom: AI returns low-confidence. UI freezes. User abandons.
antipattern.root-cause: Fallback behavior not named in story.
antipattern.fix: Per-AC fallback row: low-confidence path + refusal path + timeout path.

antipattern.symptom: Eng must seed golden set without business context. Coverage gaps emerge after launch.
antipattern.fix: Story-template requires ≥5 seed rows per AC; BA fills before handoff.
